rules.reason: Extension metadata and JSON changes require static and metadata validation.
Connector changes can affect contracts and shared worker boundaries.
Acquisition worker changes require worker and connector-contract coverage.
Test infrastructure changes must prove the complete core gate still runs.
New root-level test suites require the complete current core gate.
Deployment changes require offline metadata/static validation and future package validation.
Manifest changes affect extension packaging and static inventory.
Documentation alone does not add a runtime test requirement.

conditionalSuites.name: Browser acceptance
conditionalSuites.reason: No browser suite exists yet; T05 owns this layer.

conditionalSuites.name: Runtime REST adapter
conditionalSuites.reason: No reusable runtime harness exists yet; T04 owns this layer.

conditionalSuites.name: Runtime worker execution
conditionalSuites.reason: Single-runner runtime validation remains manual until T04.

conditionalSuites.name: Package lifecycle
conditionalSuites.reason: Archive build and package metadata preflight are required in T05; live install, upgrade, and rollback automation remains out of scope.

optionalSuites.name: Performance baseline
optionalSuites.reason: T07 has not established a performance test layer.

optionalSuites.name: Documentation review
optionalSuites.reason: Informational only; it does not affect the core gate.
